title: Israel Launches Airstrikes in Lebanon After 4 Soldiers Are Killed
text: The violence involving Israel and Iran-backed Hezbollah militants added to pressure on the U.S.-Iran deal, which calls for fighting to stop on all fronts, including in Lebanon.
